name: HDFC Tata Neu Infinity Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 10% NeuCoins on BigBasket, 1mg, Croma, Tata CLiQ and other Tata Neu brands
5% NeuCoins on Swiggy and Zomato orders
1.5% NeuCoins on all other retail purchases

redemptionOptions: NeuCoins redeemable on Tata Neu app (1 NeuCoin = ₹1)
Use across BigBasket, 1mg, Croma, Tata CLiQ, Westside

welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

additionalBenefits: 10% NeuCoins on the entire Tata ecosystem
6 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year
NeuCoins never expire as long as card is active
Access to exclusive Tata Neu brand offers and early sales
Higher fuel surcharge waiver cap of ₹400/month
pros: 10% return on Tata Neu brands is among the highest category rates available
1 NeuCoin = ₹1 makes reward valuation simple and transparent
1.5% base earn rate is above average for all other spends
5% on Swiggy and Zomato is a great bonus for foodies
Welcome benefit of 2,500 NeuCoins more than covers the joining fee
cons: High value only if you shop frequently within the Tata ecosystem
3.5% forex markup is steep for overseas transactions
10% category rate capped at 5,000 NeuCoins per month
idealFor: Regular users of BigBasket, Croma, Tata CLiQ and other Tata Neu brands
Food delivery enthusiasts who order frequently on Swiggy and Zomato
Users who want high-value rewards within the Tata ecosystem

faqs.question: What are NeuCoins and how much are they worth?
faqs.answer: NeuCoins are the reward currency of the Tata Neu app. 1 NeuCoin = ₹1, and they can be redeemed across all Tata Neu brands including BigBasket, 1mg, Croma, Tata CLiQ, Westside, and Taj hotels.

faqs.question: Is the 10% NeuCoins on Tata brands unlimited?
faqs.answer: No, the 10% earn rate on Tata Neu brands is capped at 5,000 NeuCoins per calendar month. Beyond this cap, you earn at the standard 1.5% rate.

faqs.question: Can I use NeuCoins outside the Tata ecosystem?
faqs.answer: NeuCoins are primarily designed for use within the Tata Neu ecosystem. While statement credit conversion is available, the best value is obtained by redeeming on Tata Neu partner brands.

faqs.question: How does this card compare to the HDFC Millennia?
faqs.answer: The Tata Neu Infinity offers higher category rewards (10% vs 5%) but only within the Tata ecosystem. The Millennia is more versatile with cashback on Amazon, Flipkart, and Myntra. Choose based on where you shop most.
